add_on_services.name: Document pre-check
add_on_services.description: A visa expert reviews your application forms and supporting documents before submission to catch common mistakes and omissions.

add_on_services.name: Travel insurance package
add_on_services.description: Comprehensive travel insurance that meets common consular requirements, including emergency medical and trip interruption coverage.

add_on_services.name: Premium courier pick-up
add_on_services.description: Door-to-door courier pick-up of your passport and documents within major metropolitan areas.

add_on_services.name: SMS status updates
add_on_services.description: Receive real-time SMS notifications when your order status changes or additional documents are requested.

help_articles.title: Refund policy for visa refusals and cancellations
help_articles.content:
If your visa is refused, you may be eligible for a partial refund of our service fees in accordance with the conditions below.

1. Government and consular fees are non-refundable once your application has been submitted to the consulate.
2. Our service fees may be partially refunded when a refusal is clearly not caused by false, incomplete, or misleading information provided by the applicant.
3. Requests for refunds must be submitted in writing within 30 days of the refusal decision.
4. In some cases, we may offer a credit toward a future application instead of a cash refund.

Service fees cover document checking, application preparation, courier coordination, and customer support time already spent on your order. For this reason, we cannot guarantee a full refund even in the event of a refusal.

For detailed examples and step-by-step instructions on how to request a refund after a refusal, please see the sections below.

This policy applies only to orders placed directly through our website. Third-party resellers may have different refund rules.
help_articles.preview_text: Learn when service fees can be partially refunded in the event of a visa refusal, and which government fees are non-refundable.

help_articles.title: General FAQs about our visa services
help_articles.content:
This article answers the most common questions about how our visa services work, including processing times, document requirements, and how to track your order.

Topics covered:
- Which nationalities require a visa
- Typical processing times
- How to upload documents securely
- How to contact customer support

For information on refunds, please refer to our dedicated refund policy article.
help_articles.preview_text: Answers to the most common questions about visa requirements, processing times, and how to use our services.

help_articles.title: Shipping options and passport return
help_articles.content:
We offer multiple return shipping options for your passport, including standard mail, express courier, and combined return packages for families and groups.

Standard mail is the most economical option but may take longer in transit. Express courier provides faster, trackable delivery.

Group applicants can often save money by choosing a combined return package instead of individual return shipping per passport.

All return shipments include basic tracking where available. For international deliveries, additional transit time may apply.
help_articles.preview_text: Learn about standard mail, express courier, and combined return package options for returning your passport.

promo_codes.description: Save 20% on visa services when your subtotal is at least $300.
New customers receive $10 off their first visa service order.
Free standard return shipping on eligible orders.

shipping_methods.name: Standard mail
shipping_methods.description: Economy return shipping for your passport via standard postal service within the United States.

shipping_methods.name: Express courier
shipping_methods.description: Fast, trackable courier delivery of your passport, typically next business day in major metro areas.

shipping_methods.name: Individual return shipping per passport
shipping_methods.description: Separate tracked return shipment for each passport in your order, ideal when travelers live at different addresses.

shipping_methods.name: Combined return package
shipping_methods.description: All passports in your group are returned together in a single tracked shipment to one address, offering the lowest total cost.

visa_products.name: Short-stay Schengen (Type C) – Tourism – France (U.S. citizens)
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Single or multiple entries, total stay up to 90 days in any 180-day period within Schengen.
visa_products.description: Tourist Schengen visa (Type C) for U.S. citizens visiting France and other Schengen states for up to 90 days. Ideal for vacations, sightseeing, and visiting friends or relatives.

visa_products.name: Short-stay Schengen (Type C) – Business – France (U.S. citizens)

visa_products.description: Business Schengen visa (Type C) for U.S. citizens attending meetings, conferences, or events in France and other Schengen countries.

visa_products.name: India Tourist Visa – U.S. Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Tourist stays typically up to 90 days per visit, subject to government rules.
visa_products.description: Tourist visa service for U.S. citizens traveling to India for leisure, sightseeing, or visiting friends and relatives. Includes application review and guidance.

visa_products.name: India Tourist Visa – Canadian Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Tourist visits up to 90 days per entry, depending on consular issuance.
visa_products.description: Tourist visa processing for Canadian citizens visiting India for leisure or family visits.

visa_products.name: Vietnam Tourist – Single entry – 30 days (Canadian citizens)
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Single-entry tourist stay in Vietnam for up to 30 days.
visa_products.description: Single-entry tourist visa service for Canadian citizens visiting Vietnam for up to 30 days. Suitable for one-time vacation trips.

visa_products.name: Vietnam Tourist – Multiple entry – 30 days (Canadian citizens)
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Multiple entries within a 30-day validity period, subject to government rules.
visa_products.description: Multiple-entry tourist visa service for Canadian citizens who need to enter Vietnam more than once within 30 days.

visa_products.name: Brazil Tourist Visa – U.S. Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Tourist stays in Brazil generally up to 90 days per visit.
visa_products.description: Tourist visa service for U.S. citizens traveling to Brazil for vacations, tourism, or visiting relatives. Supports family and group applications with combined return shipping.

visa_products.name: Japan Tourist Visa – U.S. Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Short-term tourist visits to Japan, usually up to 90 days.
visa_products.description: Tourist visa service for U.S. citizens traveling to Japan for sightseeing, cultural visits, or family trips. Ideal for single or multiple travelers in one order.

visa_products.name: Japan Tourist Visa – Canadian Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Tourist visits up to 90 days, subject to Japanese consulate rules.
visa_products.description: Tourist visa assistance for Canadian citizens planning short stays in Japan.

visa_products.name: Short-stay Schengen (Type C) – Tourism – Germany (U.S. citizens)
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Tourist stays up to 90 days within any 180-day period in Schengen.
visa_products.description: Tourist Schengen visa for U.S. citizens whose main destination is Germany.

visa_products.name: Schengen Airport Transit – U.S. Residents (select nationalities)
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: For airside transit only; no entry into the Schengen area.
visa_products.description: Assistance with airport transit Schengen visas for eligible travelers connecting through Schengen airports.

visa_products.name: China Tourist Visa – U.S. Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Tourist stays typically up to 30–60 days per entry, as granted by consulate.
visa_products.description: Tourist visa processing service for U.S. citizens traveling to China for leisure or family visits.

visa_products.name: Brazil Business Visa – U.S. Citizens
visa_products.allowed_stay_description: Business visits up to 90 days per entry, as authorized.
visa_products.description: Business visa assistance for U.S. citizens attending meetings, conferences, or short-term projects in Brazil.
